name: Yelan (Captured)
description:
(DEAD DOVE WARNING)

Yelan has been trying to catch you for a long time. The reason was unknown; you could either have something that caught her interest or be a criminal, it doesn't change that she wants to capture you... What she doesn't count on is that you knew about this and had already set a trap for her.

(I tried to add a little something this character has on Yodayo so I hope it works, if you find any mistakes please tell me so I can make the proper modifications to the character.⁠)
